# Architectural Decision Record (ADR)

## Title
- Short decision name

## Status
- [Proposed / Accepted / Superseded / Rejected]

## Context & Sourcing
- **Problem:** What technical limitation or tradeoff triggered this decision?
- **Sourcing Posture:** Does this align with the Build/Buy/OSS mandate from the Feature Brief?

## Decision
- What specific technology, pattern, or dependency was chosen?

## Security & Compliance Audit
- **Security:** Does this introduce new vectors? (e.g., How are secrets handled? Does it violate our CSP?)
- **Accessibility/UI:** Does this introduce inaccessible 3rd-party UI? 
- **Telemetry:** Does this leak PII?

## Consequences
- **Positive:** What gets easier or faster?
- **Negative:** What tech debt, monthly costs, or maintenance burden are we accepting?

## Alternatives Considered
- **Option 1:** [Name] - Why it was rejected (Cost, Security, Friction)
- **Option 2:** [Name] - Why it was rejected
